name: Skillet Golden Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cornmeal into the boiling water.
2. Add the shortening, sugar, and salt to the cornmeal mixture. Mix well.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients (corn syrup, flour, baking powder, and milk). Combine until smooth.
4. Grease an 8-inch skillet and pour the batter into it.
5. Cover the skillet and cook over low heat for 12 minutes.
Serves 6-8.
